en.boatBody:
The Van Dutch 40

The Van Dutch 40 is a 40-foot motor yacht designed to fit up to 8 guests. It features 1 cabin and 1 bath, providing ample space for a comfortable day on the water.

What's included

Your rental includes a professional captain, crew, and an onboard chef. You will also have access to a full open bar during your time on the yacht.

Yacht rental in Cozumel

While on the water, you can explore Cozumel's reefs, including Palancar, Colombia, and El Cielo's starfish sandbar. These spots are known for some of the clearest water and best snorkeling in Mexico.

Half-day and full-day rentals

  • 3 Hours
  • 5 Hours
  • 6 Hours
  • 9 Hours

We also offer a romantic dinner option for 2. The price includes 6 guests for standard rentals.

How to book

A 50% deposit is required to reserve your rental. There is a $20 dock fee at the marina, and $180 for each extra guest beyond the included 6. We handle the booking from start to finish.
en.boatSummary: The Van Dutch 40 is a 40-foot motor yacht for up to 8 guests. This sleek boat rental in Cozumel is quick and easy to handle for half or full days. Every rental includes a captain, crew, and an onboard chef. We take care of everything from start to finish.

es.boatBody:

Qué incluye

Tu renta incluye un capitán profesional, tripulación y un chef a bordo. También tendrás acceso a una barra libre completa durante tu tiempo en el yate.

Renta de yate en Cozumel

Mientras estés en el agua, puedes explorar los arrecifes de Cozumel, incluyendo Palancar, Colombia y la barra de estrellas de El Cielo. Estos lugares son conocidos por tener algunas de las aguas más claras y el mejor esnórquel en México.

Rentas de medio día y día completo

  • 3 Horas
  • 5 Horas
  • 6 Horas
  • 9 Horas

También ofrecemos una opción de cena romántica para 2. El precio incluye 6 huéspedes para rentas estándar.

Cómo reservar

The Leopard PowerCat 51 is a 51-foot power catamaran that can fit up to 30 guests. It features 4 cabins and 3 baths, making it spacious enough for a group outing or a family gathering.

What's included

Your rental includes a captain and crew to ensure a smooth experience. An onboard chef is available to prepare meals, and a full open bar is provided for all guests.

Catamaran rental in Tulum

When you rent the Leopard PowerCat 51, you can explore the Tulum coast and the nearby reef. A full-day run down to Cozumel offers opportunities for snorkeling and swimming in clear waters.

The Azimut 58 is a 58-foot motor yacht that fits up to 15 guests. It features 3 cabins and 2 baths, providing ample space for relaxation and fun on the water.

What's included

Your rental includes a captain, crew, and an onboard chef. A full open bar is also provided to keep your drinks flowing throughout your time on the yacht.

Yacht rental in Tulum

  • 5 Hours

The Lagoon 42 is a 42-foot catamaran that fits up to 20 guests. It features 4 cabins and 4 baths, providing ample space for your group. This boat is designed for comfort and stability on the water.

What's included

Your rental includes a captain and crew to handle all the details. An onboard chef prepares meals, and a full open bar is available for your enjoyment throughout the trip.

Catamaran rental in Cancún

From the Cancún marina, we head out for a short run to Isla Mujeres, the reefs off Punta Nizuc, and the nearby sandbar. You can snorkel, swim, or relax while taking in the sights along the way.

Half-day and full-day rentals

  • Half-day options: 4 hours
  • Full-day options: 8 hours
  • Packages available: romanticDinner, coastFun, funPlus, bachelorParty, coastPizza, djParty, coastFunFullDay

Pricing includes up to 8 guests for dinner options. Additional guests can join for a fee.

How to book

A 50% deposit is required to reserve your rental. There is a $15 dock fee at the marina, and each extra guest is $180. We handle the booking from start to finish.

Desde la marina de Cancún, nos dirigimos a un recorrido corto hacia Isla Mujeres, los arrecifes frente a Punta Nizuc, y la barra de arena cercana. Puedes hacer esnórquel, nadar o relajarte mientras disfrutas de las vistas en el camino.

en.boatBody:
The Leopard PowerCat 51

The Leopard PowerCat 51 is a 51-foot power catamaran that fits up to 30 guests. It features 4 cabins and 3 baths, providing ample space for your group. This boat is designed for those who want to take in the water with friends and family.

What's included

Your rental includes a skilled captain and crew to ensure a smooth experience. An onboard chef is available to prepare meals, and a full open bar is provided for your enjoyment.

Catamaran rental in Cancún

The Leopard PowerCat 51 offers quick access from the Cancún marina to Isla Mujeres, the reefs off Punta Nizuc, and the nearby sandbar. You can snorkel, swim, or simply relax on the water during your trip.

Half-day and full-day rentals

  • 3 Hours
  • 5 Hours
  • 6 Hours
  • 9 Hours
  • Overnight (2 days · free night)

Prices include up to 8 guests, with the option for a romantic dinner for 2 available.

How to book

A 50% deposit is required to reserve your rental. There is a $15 dock fee at the marina, and $180 for each extra guest beyond the initial 8. We handle the booking process from start to finish.
en.boatSummary: The Leopard 51 is a 51-foot power catamaran available for rental in Cancún, accommodating up to 30 guests. This spacious vessel combines speed and stability, making it perfect for larger groups looking to explore the waters. Each charter includes a captain, crew, and an onboard chef to handle all your needs.
en.name: Leopard PowerCat 51

es.boatBody:
El Leopard PowerCat 51

El Leopard PowerCat 51 es un catamarán motorizado de 51 pies que acomoda hasta 30 huéspedes. Cuenta con 4 cabinas y 3 baños, proporcionando un amplio espacio para tu grupo. Este barco está diseñado para aquellos que quieren disfrutar del agua con amigos y familiares.

Qué incluye

Tu renta incluye un capitán y tripulación calificados para asegurar una experiencia fluida. Un chef a bordo está disponible para preparar comidas, y se proporciona una barra libre completa para tu disfrute.

Renta de catamarán en Cancún

El Leopard PowerCat 51 ofrece acceso rápido desde la marina de Cancún a Isla Mujeres, los arrecifes frente a Punta Nizuc, y la barra de arena cercana. Puedes hacer esnórquel, nadar, o simplemente relajarte en el agua durante tu viaje.

Rentas de medio día y día completo

  • 3 Horas
  • 5 Horas
  • 6 Horas
  • 9 Horas
  • Nocturna (2 días · noche gratis)

Los precios incluyen hasta 8 huéspedes, con la opción de una cena romántica para 2 disponible.

Cómo reservar

Se requiere un depósito del 50% para reservar tu renta. Hay una tarifa de muelle de $15 en la marina, y $180 por cada huésped extra más allá de los 8 iniciales. Nos encargamos del proceso de reserva de principio a fin.
es.boatSummary: El Leopard 51 es un catamarán de potencia de 51 pies disponible para renta en Cancún, con capacidad para hasta 30 invitados. Esta embarcación espaciosa combina velocidad y estabilidad, haciéndola perfecta para grupos grandes que buscan explorar las aguas. Cada charter incluye un capitán, tripulación y un chef a bordo para atender todas tus necesidades.
